---
title: "Khoi T. Phan"
sortby: "Phan, Tuan Khoi"
subtitle: "Undergraduate Student"
image: phantuan_khoi.jpg
toc: false
started: "Sept. 2021"
ended: "Current"
about:
  id: person-profile
  template: jolla
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../people.html">People</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active">Undergraduate Students</li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">{{< meta title >}}</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

:::{#person-profile}
:::

## Biography
Trung T. Nguyen received the B.S. degree in Electrical and Computer Engineering at College of Engineering and Computer Science, VinUniversity.

## Education

- [VinUniversity]{.fw-bold} | Hanoi, Vietnam<br />
  B.S. in Electrical and Computer Engineering | 2021-2025
